---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it useful?

## 📋 Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail:

- What changes would need to be made?
- How would users interact with this feature?
- What would the user interface look like?

## 🎨 Mockups

If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to help illustrate your idea:

## 🔄 Alternatives

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered:

## 📊 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here:

## ⚙️ Configuration

If this feature requires configuration, describe the settings:

```json
{
  "yourExtension.yourSetting": "value"
}
```

## 🤝 Contribution

Are you willing to contribute to this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can help implement this
- [ ] Yes, I can help with documentation
- [ ] No, I can only provide feedback and testing
